dimensions.name: correctness
dimensions.evidence: Targeted run `sh tests/integration/test-reintegration.sh` passed 60/60, including generation, markers, template use, schema-invalid rejection, and update-summary round-trip preservation.

dimensions.name: test-coverage
dimensions.evidence: `tests/integration/test-reintegration.sh` covers the generator, template fallback/override, launch handoff contract via get-reintegration-json, update-summary rejection, and round-trip preservation.

dimensions.name: spec-compliance
dimensions.evidence: `generate-reintegration.sh` validates with an inline jq subset before writing rather than validating against `schemas/reintegration.schema.json`, and the schema does not require `test_results.evidence_path` despite the stated contract.

dimensions.name: unplanned-changes
dimensions.evidence: `definition.yaml` file_ownership for this deliverable omits `bin/frw.d/scripts/generate-reintegration.sh`, which is a deliverable implementation file, with no ownership justification there.

dimensions.name: code-quality
dimensions.evidence: `shellcheck -S warning` reports SC2038 in `generate-reintegration.sh` and POSIX SC3001 process substitution in `tests/integration/test-reintegration.sh` under `#!/bin/sh`.
